title: 1 Searched TV Show on Google this year - Prediction Market
text: This prediction market on Polymarket asks which TV show will be the #1 searched show on Google for 2025. The market resolves according to the television show ranked #1 in Google's official Year in Search list for 2025, published at trends.withgoogle.com/year-in-search under Global → Entertainment → TV Shows. If none of the listed options is ranked #1 in the respective list or if Google does not release the 2025 Year in Search by March 31, 2026, the market will resolve to Other. The market includes options for shows like Squid Game and others, with oddsmakers and traders evaluating which show will generate the most search interest on Google throughout 2025. The actual resolution depends on Google's official Year in Search rankings when they are released. This prediction market demonstrates how traders and prediction market participants assess entertainment trends and search behavior patterns.
